top_signals.title: Multibillion-dollar contract secures ‘major step forward’ for GCAP fighter jet
top_signals.summary: Japan, Italy and the U.K. have handed a £4.6 billion ($6.1 billion) development contract to their national champions building the GCAP jet.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil’s Supply Wave, Tumbling Prices Rekindle Fears of Global Glut - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil’s Supply Wave, Tumbling Prices Rekindle Fears of Global Glut  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Permian natural gas production increased faster than crude oil
top_signals.summary: The Permian region's marketed natural gas production grew from 17.2 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) in 2021 to 27.6 Bcf/d in 2025, a 60% increase, according to data from our latest Short Term Energy Outlook. Over the same period, crude oil production grew by 39%, going from 4.7 million barrels per day (b/d) to 6.6 million b/d. The higher growth in natural gas production is the result of increasing gas-oil ratios (GOR).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Solar generation in CAISO surpassed natural gas in the first five months of 2026
top_signals.summary: In the first five months of 2026, utility-scale solar generation surpassed natural gas generation in CAISO. Solar electricity generation in the California Independent System Operator (CAISO) over the first five months of 2026 increased 21% compared with the same period in 2024, and natural gas generation decreased by 60%, data from our Hourly Electric Grid Monitor shows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 10-man England outlasts Mexico to advance to World Cup quarterfinals
top_signals.summary: The result set up a last-eight clash with Norway, ​which shocked Brazil 2-1 earlier on Sunday.

top_signals.title: The Strong Do What They Can—and Suffer What They Must
top_signals.summary: What Thucydides really thought about power.

top_signals.title: Aave’s new Monad market tops $100 million in deposits two days after launch
top_signals.summary: Aave's V4 deployment also crossed $250 million in deposits on Saturday, a new all-time high for that version of the protocol.
